user.title: Add your Tuiss SmartView Blind
user.description: Please make sure that you have connected to the Tuiss SmartView app before using this integration in order to correctly set the top and bottom limits. The MAC address can be found on the tag that came attached to your blind or on a label that is printed at the top of the blind, near to where the battery is attached.

confirm.title: Name your Tuiss SmartView Blind
confirm.description: Please add a friendly name for your blind.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. This error should not be possible, if you get it please raise an issue.
error.unknown: Unknown error. Please try again. If you consistently get this error please raise an issue.
error.device_not_found: The device could not be found. Please ensure it is powered on and in range.
error.connection_timeout: The connection timed out after several retries. Please try again later.
error.no_connectable_bluetooth: No connectable Bluetooth adapter. Shelly and similar devices only discover devices; they cannot connect. You need an ESPHome Bluetooth proxy (e.g. ESP32) or a USB Bluetooth adapter on your Home Assistant host to control Tuiss blinds.
error.invalid_host: Your MAC address must be in the format XX:XX:XX:XX:XX:XX
error.invalid_name: Your name must be longer than 0 characters

abort.already_configured_by_discovery: This device has already been discovered. Please configure it through the discovered devices list.

data.blind_restart_position: Check for blind position on restart
data.blind_speed: How fast should the blind move to position

data_description.blind_restart_position: Fetch the blinds current position following a Home Assistant restart. Useful if you use the Smartview app or a remote control.
data_description.blind_restart_attempts: Connection attempts that will be made before timing out. Increase this if you find that you are getting dropped requests. Note: the distance between blinds and Bluetooth proxies/dongles is the main cause for connection drop-offs.
data_description.blind_favorite_position: The position (in percent, 0=closed, 100=open) that the blind will move to when the 'Go to Favorite Position' button is pressed.
data_description.blind_battery_check_days: The number of days between automatic battery checks (checks are made when the blind moves). Set to 0 to disable automatic checks.

set_lower_limit.title: Set Lower Limit
set_lower_limit.description:
Use the menu options below to move (continuous movement) or step (incremental movement) the blind to the desired lower limit position. Select 'Save Lower Limit' when done.

**WARNING: Do not close this window before finishing setting the limits, or the blinds may not function correctly. Use the Save options to ensure limits are saved correctly.**

set_upper_limit.title: Set Upper Limit
set_upper_limit.description:
Use the menu options below to move (continuous movement) or step (incremental movement) the blind to the desired upper limit position. Select 'Save Upper Limit' when done.

**WARNING: Do not close this window before finishing setting the limits, or the blinds may not function correctly. Use the Save options to ensure limits are saved correctly.**

delete_all_timers_confirm.title: Delete all timers?
delete_all_timers_confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete all timers from this blind? This action cannot be undone.

reconnect_failed.title: Reconnection Failed
reconnect_failed.description: Failed to reconnect to the blind. Please check the blind and try again.

progress.reconnecting_limits: Disconnected from the blind. Attempting to reconnect and reinitialise limits...

error.blind_is_moving: The blind is currently moving. Please wait for it to stop before changing the speed.
error.position_unknown: Cannot set limit - blind position is unknown. Move the blind first.
error.limits_not_set: Both lower and upper limits must be set before closing this dialog.
error.multiple_actions_selected: Please select only one action at a time.

get_battery_status.name: Get Battery Status
get_battery_status.description: Requests the battery status for the selected Tuiss blinds.

get_blind_position.name: Get Blind Position
get_blind_position.description: Requests the current position of the selected Tuiss blinds.

set_blind_position.name: Set Blind Position
set_blind_position.description: Set the position of the blind with single decimal point precision (0.0-100.0)

position.name: Position
position.description: Target position between 0.0 (Closed) and 100.0 (Open) with 1 decimal place precision

set_blind_speed.name: Set Blind Speed
set_blind_speed.description: Set the speed of the blind motor

speed.name: Speed
speed.description: Target speed for the blind motor

simultaneous_blind_positioning.name: Simultaneous Blind Positioning
simultaneous_blind_positioning.description: Set the position of multiple blinds simultaneously. Multiple entities must be selected for this action to work. This action should only be used if you want blinds to move at the same time and have enough Bluetooth devices to handle the number of connections you want to make (e.g., 3 connections per ESPHome proxy).

position.name: Position
position.description: Target position between 0.0 (Closed) and 100.0 (Open) with 1 decimal place precision

favourite.name: Favourite Position
favourite.description: Move the blind to its favourite position as set in the options. If set, this will ignore the 'position' field.

force_unlock.name: Force Unlock
force_unlock.description: Force unlock a blind that is stuck in a locked state

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The blind entity to force unlock.

add_blind_timer.name: Add Blind Timer
add_blind_timer.description: Add a timer for the blind to move to a specific position on selected days at a specific time, independently of Home Assistant or any other automations you may have set up. This is useful if you want to set a recurring schedule for your blinds that is not dependent on sunrise/sunset or other triggers. Please note, this timer will run locally on the blind and the blind can support a maximum of 16 timers in total. Timers set here and on the Tuiss app will share the same available slots.

position.name: Position
position.description: Target position between 0.00 (Closed) and 100.00 (Open) with 2 decimal place precision

days.name: Days
days.description: Days of the week to run this timer

time.name: Time
time.description: Time of day to trigger the action

delete_blind_timer.name: Delete Blind Timer
delete_blind_timer.description: Delete an existing timer from a blind. You can select the specific timer entity to remove directly.

entity_id.name: Timer Entity
entity_id.description: Select the timer you wish to remove.

failed_set_position.message: {name} failed to set position with error {error}

device_locked.message: {name} is busy. Please wait for the current operation to finish.

max_timers_reached.message: Maximum number of timers ({max_timers}) reached for this blind.

not_a_timer.message: The selected entity is not a timer. Please select a valid Timer entity.

blind_not_found.message: Associated blind for this timer could not be found.
